summary: PR 2304 made focused THP decoder changes in the Dolphin THP header and implementation: recovered/reshaped several THP struct fields, changed THPInit to void and added low-level cache/locked-cache setup calls, passed THPFileInfo explicitly into the 512x448 iMCU row decoder path, and made small formatting/control-flow edits. The bot report showed net matched-code improvement and one new matched function, but also one broken match and one unmatched-item regression; there were no human review comments and the PR was closed unmerged.

key_files.role: THP public/internal declarations and struct layout updates for THPHuffmanTab, THPComponent, THPFileInfo, __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448, and THPInit
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: extern/dolphin/include/dolphin/thp/thp.h added 10 deleted 8 hunks 4

raw_diff: thp.h hunks changing pad2[2] to pad2 plus num_Vij, adding THPComponent placeholder byte, changing THPFileInfo pad2 to byte array, changing __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 prototype to take THPFileInfo*, and changing THPInit return type to void

key_files.role: THP decoder implementation changes for explicit info parameter use, Huffman table field access, THPInit setup, and minor formatting/control-flow shape edits
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp/THPDec.c added 41 deleted 37 hunks 9
raw_diff: __THPDecompressYUV now calls __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448(__THPInfo)
raw_diff: __THPReadHuffmanTableSpecification writes info->huffmanTabs[tab_index].num_Vij instead of pad2[1]
raw_diff: __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 now takes THPFileInfo* info and replaces repeated __THPInfo accesses with info accesses

raw_diff: THPInit changes from BOOL return to void, adds PPCMfhid2/DCInvalidateRange/LCEnable guarded setup, calls OSInitFastCast, changes THPLCWork672 offsets, and removes __THPInitFlag assignment/TRUE return

what_changed.text: Recovered a named Huffman-table count field by replacing THPHuffmanTab pad2[2] with pad2 plus u16 num_Vij, then using num_Vij in __THPReadHuffmanTableSpecification.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPHuffmanTab field change
raw_diff: info->huffmanTabs[tab_index].pad2[1] changed to info->huffmanTabs[tab_index].num_Vij

what_changed.text: Adjusted THP struct layout padding: THPComponent gained an unnamed u8 placeholder before predDC, and THPFileInfo pad2 changed from a u32 array expression to a byte array sized 0x83d - 0x756.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPComponent adds u8 _
raw_diff: THPFileInfo pad2[(0x83d - 0x756) / 4] changed to u8 pad2[0x83d - 0x756]

what_changed.text: Changed __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 to accept THPFileInfo* and use the passed info for MCUsPerRow, Huffman decode calls, components, quantTabs, RST/currMCU/nMCU/cnt, and predDC resets.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: prototype and definition of __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 changed from void to THPFileInfo* parameter
raw_diff: repeated replacements of __THPInfo with info inside __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448

what_changed.text: Changed THPInit signature from BOOL to void in the header and source, added conditional cache/LC initialization, called OSInitFastCast, adjusted THPLCWork672 base increments, and removed TRUE return behavior.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: thp.h BOOL THPInit(void) changed to void THPInit(void)
raw_diff: THPInit adds PPCMfhid2, DCInvalidateRange, LCEnable, OSInitFastCast, offset changes, and return;

what_changed.text: Made small formatting/control-flow layout edits around else braces and loop brace placement.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: else brace style changes in THPVideoDecode and __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompU
raw_diff: for loop brace formatting in __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY

smart_moves.text: Replacing pad-index access with a named num_Vij field improves reviewability and aligns with typed-field-over-pointer/padding cleanup when the field role is evident from nearby code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPHuffmanTab adds num_Vij
raw_diff: __THPReadHuffmanTableSpecification stores num_Vij into the named field

smart_moves.text: Passing THPFileInfo* into __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 made the function use the same explicit-info style as surrounding decode helpers such as __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY/U/V.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448(THPFileInfo* info)
raw_diff: __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY/U/V calls receive info

smart_moves.text: The PR kept header declarations in sync with implementation signature changes for __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 and THPInit.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: thp.h prototype changes
raw_diff: THPDec.c definition changes

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a padding slot is consistently used for a meaningful value, a narrow struct-field recovery can replace opaque pad indexing, but the layout impact should be tracked because this PR also changed adjacent padding types.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPHuffmanTab pad2[2] changed to pad2 plus num_Vij
raw_diff: pad2[1] use changed to num_Vij

decomp_lessons.lesson: Signature recovery should update both the implementation and owning header together; this PR changed local static and public prototypes alongside the function bodies.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 prototype and definition changed
raw_diff: THPInit header declaration and source definition changed

decomp_lessons.lesson: A bot-reported net score improvement is not enough to treat a matching change as clean when the same report lists a broken match or regression; keep the regression ledger attached to the PR.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev[bot] report shows +0.03%, +984 bytes and 1 new match
text_corpus: same report shows 1 broken match in __THPPrepBitStream and 1 regression in __THPReadScaneHeader

raw_diff: info->huffmanTabs[tab_index].num_Vij = num_Vij

naming_conventions.name: info

raw_diff: info->MCUsPerRow and info->components/quantTabs/RST/currMCU uses

naming_conventions.context: Unnamed/placeholder u8 field added at the start of THPComponent; semantic meaning is not established by the PR evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use an explicit THPFileInfo* parameter to influence access shape and reduce repeated global __THPInfo references in one decoder row function.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: __THPDecompressYUV passes __THPInfo to __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448
raw_diff: __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 replaces many __THPInfo accesses with info
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: No inline reviewer explanation is present, and the bot report does not isolate this function as a new match; treat as a tactic candidate, not a proven global pattern.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Recover byte-accurate struct padding where offsets appear non-word-sized.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPFileInfo pad2 changed from u32 pad2[(0x83d - 0x756) / 4] to u8 pad2[0x83d - 0x756]
raw_diff: THPComponent adds u8 _ before predDC
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: The PR evidence does not include explicit offset verification; changed padding should be reviewed against struct layout and object diff evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Small brace-formatting changes can affect matching in sensitive SDK-like code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: brace style changes near THPVideoDecode, __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY, and __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompU
text_corpus: bot report shows +1 byte/new match for __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY and minor changes in U/V
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: The report associates score changes with functions but does not prove each formatting edit caused the result.

review_feedback.text: Report for GALE01 showed matched code 58.01% (+0.03%, +984 bytes), 1 new match: main/dolphin/thp/THPDec __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY from 99.99% to 100.00%. It also showed 1 broken match: __THPPrepBitStream from 100.00% to 99.96%, 6 improvements in unmatched items including THPInit +111 bytes from 10.60% to 32.12%, and 1 regression in __THPReadScaneHeader from 42.59% to 42.57%.

source_update_candidates.title: Struct padding recovery should carry layout evidence

Curator may consider whether existing typed-fields and verification standards already cover this or whether a more specific reminder is useful.

rejection_notes: Do not promote THPInit returning void as an accepted project fact from this slice alone; the PR was closed unmerged and no reviewer acceptance is present.
Do not infer that the THPLCWork672 offset changes are correct beyond recording that the diff made them; no rationale or validation details are present.
Do not infer human reviewer intent; there were no review comments in the loaded evidence.
Do not claim the PR matched THPInit or fixed all THPDec issues; bot evidence only shows THPInit improved from 10.60% to 32.12% and reports other regressions.
